title: New Ores and Armors
description: A mod that contains new ores and armors.
body:
New Ores and Armors Mod

You always wanted a mod with new ores and armors? Then this is the perfect mod for you!

 

Current Items:

Ores: Ruby ore, Sapphire ore, Topaz ore, moonstone ore, sunstone ore, Bronze ore, Onyx ore, Silver ore, Steel ore, Angelite ore, Turmaline ore, Tanzanite ore, Platinum ore, Uranium ore
Blocks: Ruby block, Sapphire block, Topaz block, moonstone block, sunstone block, Bronze block, Onyx block, Silver block, Steel block, Angelite block, Turmaline block, Tanzanite block, Platinum block, Uranium block
Gems: Ruby, Sapphire, Topaz, Moonstone, Sunstone, Bronze Ingot, Onyx, Silver Ingot, Ice Ingot, Steel Ingot, Angelite, Turmaline, Tanzanite, Platinum Ingot, Uranium
Armors: Emerald armor, Amethyst armor, Ruby armor, Sapphire armor, Topaz armor, Moonstone armor, Sunstone armor, Bronze armor, Onyx armor, Silver armor, Ice armor, Steel armor, Angelite armor, Turmaline armor, Tanzanite armor, Platinum armor
Tools: Emerald tools, Amethyst tools, Ruby tools, Sapphire tools, Topaz tools, Moonstone tools, Sunstone tools, Bronze tools, Onyx tools, Silver tools, Ice tools, Steel tools, Angelite tools, Turmaline tools, Tanzanite tools, Platinum tools
Potions: Uranium potion
Rings: Ruby ring, Sapphire ring, Topaz ring, Angelite ring, Turmaline ring, Tanzanite ring, Onyx ring, Moonstone ring, Sunstone ring
Structure: A meteor where moonstone and sunstone can be found
 

Heights of the ores:

Ruby, Sapphire and Topaz: from -64 to 16 in the surface
Bronze: from -5 to 256 in the surface
Deepslate Bronze: from -64 to 0 in the surface
Onyx: from -64 to 256 in the end
Silver: from -5 to 256 in the surface
Steel: from -5 to 256 in the surface
Angelite: from -64 to 5 in the surface
Turmaline: from -64 to 5 in the surface
Tanzanite: from -64 to 5 in the surface
Platinum: from -64 to 5 in the surface
Uranium: from -64 to 5 in the surface
 

Modpack Usage:

You can use this in your modpacks as long as the modpack is free.
